since_last: 47% of 86 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.64%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 47% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.44% · BTC -0.38% · Gold -2.70% · Nasdaq100 -3.29%. 47% of 86 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.64%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.64%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.81%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +5.30%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +5.30%, AVGO +3.59%, MU +3.47%, ARM +3.15%, MRVL +2.14%. Laggards: ZBRA -3.24%, SPCX -2.28%, PLTR -2.17%, BABA -1.67%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.28% at $152.55
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.28% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
